title: Crab Mod
description: Adds cutes little crabs to the game, they spawn at beach biomes !
body:
# Crab Mod
The cute little crabs spawn at beaches and can be bred by feeding them Kelp!


Try Feeding them: 
- Tropical Fish
- Salmon
- Seagrass



(This mod is inspired and a collaboration with the streamer [3rdactive](https://twitch.tv/3rdactive) who made all the cute assets <3)
